title: Senior Software Engineer - Mphasis Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Mphasis Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Mphasis Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mphasis Digital Technologies:
Mphasis Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mphasis Digital Technologies!
